ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-26-2011 IN DEPT. 220, APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENSE COUNSEL DID NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). TRIAL IS SEPTEMBER 12, 2011 AT 11:15 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 220. PLAINTIFF AGREED SUMMARY MOTIONS MAY BE FILED ON 15 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT AN ADDITIONAL TWO DAYS FOR ESERVICE. LAST DAY TO HEAR SUMMARY MOTIONS IS SEPTEMBER 1. PLAINTIFFS TO MAKE A DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN AUGUST 23. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS IN ROOM 603 AT 1:30 PM ON SEPTEMBER 1. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 30 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 50 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED ON SEPTEMBER 12, 2011. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED (220)

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Set For Trial On Sep-12-11 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 220

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-14-2011 Off Calendar

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Continued To Oct-14-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 502

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Continued To Oct-11-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 502
MINI MINUTES: Judge James Robertson, Clerk Karissa Shaw. (502)
Reporter: Sheila Arceno, CSR #13293 (Hired for Utterback, 275121)
Sarnoff Court Reporters, (415) 274-9977

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff's counsel Chris Hersom and Jennifer Alesio of Brayton Purcell LLP.
No defense counsel signed-in on the sheet.

At 2:30 p.m., counsel informs the court that Union Carbide has settled out of the Walker case. The court consolidates the Walker case with Group 1 for trial.

The plaintiff requests that the Utterback case be consolidated as well because the cancer allegation is being dropped from the complaint. After hearing argument, the court takes the matter under submission.

Pertinent pre-hardship motions in limine for the cases are discussed by court and counsel. The court will decide whether or not to consolidate Utterback on Tuesday morning (10/11/11). Jury hardshipping will be conducted that day in the afternoon.

The court takes a recess from 3:11 p.m. to 3:15 p.m.

The court will need a generic statement of the case from counsel on Tuesday morning. Counsel will not need to be present for jury hardshipping. The motion to consolidate Utterback will be served on defendants in Groups 1 and 2 as well as the Utterback defense counsel.

The cases will reconvene on Tuesday, October 11, 2011 at 10:00 a.m. for pre-hardship motions in limine, the consolidation ruling on Utterback and the generic statement of the case. Jury hardshipping will commence on that day at 1:30 p.m. Voir dire will take place on Wednesday, 10/12/11, at 9:30 a.m.

At 3:30 p.m., this matter is adjourned.

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Continued To Oct-06-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 502
MINI MINUTES: Judge James Robertson, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (502)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiffs' counsel Chris Hersom of Brayton Purcell.
No defense counsel signed-in for this matter.

At 3:57 p.m., the court takes the bench and the proceedings commence. Counsel have elected to not hire a court reporter. Therefore, the sign-in sheets produced by the courtroom clerk will list the appearances in this matter. (The mini-minutes in IJS will reflect what's on the sign-in sheets.)

The Cronin (274286) and Gleason (275034) cases are 'stand alone' cases and will not be consolidated. There has been no motion for consolidation in the Utterback (275121) matter. Counsel dispute whether there is a pending settlement with defendant Union Carbide in the Walker case (274978). The court will not consolidate the Walker case until official confirmation is received on the settlement.

At 3:56 p.m., the court hears argument on the motion to consolidate.

At 4:03 p.m., the court makes its rulings;

Group 1: Verworn (275332), Thompson (274573), Tracy (275123), Daggs (275457) and Hoover (275131).

Group 2: Daily (275437), Harrah (275456), Sharp (275011), Sherfy (275405), Tiburcio (275415) and Veio (275443).

Group 1 will go to trial first, followed by Group 2, Gleason, Cronin and then Utterback (unless it's consolidated).

Motions in limine (in all cases) that must be ruled on before jury selection will be heard tomorrow (10/6/11) at 2:00 p.m. Jury hardshipping for Groups 1 and 2 will be conducted next Tuesday (10/11/11). Unless counsel can produce a generic juror questionnaire for hardshipping, then no questionnaire will be used at all.

Court and counsel confer on the Gleason matter. According to counsel, all motions in limine to be heard before jury selection have been ruled upon by Judge Jackson. The court acknowledges this status, but still requires counsel to appear tomorrow for the hearing.

At 4:15 p.m., this matter is adjourned.

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Continued To Oct-05-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Assigned To Trial Court
